summary: Frontend-only v1.2 validation for LindArt. All 8 requested scenarios PASSED on the public preview URL. (1) Studio share-palette-btn copies a /studio?c=HEX-HEX-...&n=...&s=... URL to clipboard and shows toast 'Link da paleta copiado'. (2) Opening /studio?c=0D1B2A-1B263B-415A77-E0E1DD&n=Teste imports the palette: toast 'Paleta "Teste" importada do link' shows, active-palette-display h3 reads 'Teste', and querystring is cleaned via history.replaceState (URL is exactly /studio after import). (3) Desktop Navbar 'Comparar' (data-testid=nav-link-compare) and MobileNav 'A/B' (data-testid=mobile-nav-compare at 390x844) both navigate to /compare. (4) /compare renders compare-page; compare-a-select and compare-b-select have 13 options (12 presets + 1 saved); changing A selection updates compare-a-contrast metric live; compare-swap-btn swaps A<->B values correctly; contrast-matrix is rendered with matrix-a-vs-b and matrix-b-vs-a. (5) Clicking a compare swatch (compare-a-swatch-*) copies HEX (e.g. #F5E6D3) to clipboard with toast '<HEX> copiado'. (6) Calculator Proporções tab: volume=100, ratio=2:1, pigment=3% produces result-resin='66.7 ml', result-hardener='33.3 ml', result-pigment='3.0 ml' — exactly per spec. (7) Calculator Precificação tab: result-preco-venda displays 'R$ 226.25' initially and updates dynamically to 'R$ 451.25' when price-hourly is changed from 40 to 100 (lucro/margem also update). (8) Smoke: all 6 routes (/, /studio, /library, /calculator, /compare, /tips) load with 0 console errors. PREVIOUS BUG FIXED: iteration_3's HIGH mobile-nav overlap is resolved — MobileNav reduced to 4 items (Início/Studio/Salvos/A/B) inside a max-w-[180px] left-aligned ul, leaving the right ~210px for the Emergent badge. Mobile click on A/B successfully navigates (URL becomes /compare).
critical_code_review_comments: share.js decodePaletteFromSearch: padEnd('0',6).slice(0,6) silently coerces malformed hex (e.g. 3-char) into nonsense colors. Consider validating /^[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/ per token and showing toast.error on invalid links instead of importing a corrupted palette — currently a graceful-degradation choice, not a bug.

Studio.jsx useEffect for decodePaletteFromSearch runs only on mount (empty deps). If a future feature triggers an in-app navigation to /studio?c=... via React Router (no full reload), import won't fire. Currently safe because share links open as full navigation.

Compare.jsx paletteContrastScore averages base-vs-others contrast — the 'VENCE' label compares raw averages, which can mislead when palettes differ in color count. Minor: could normalize or display sample size.
Calculator.jsx PricingMode markup hardcoded options [2, 2.5, 3, 4] — consider letting users type a custom multiplier; otherwise no functional issue.
Calculator.jsx VolumeMode resinWeight uses density 1.1 g/ml and hardenerWeight 1.0 — these are approximations; consider noting this in the UI (already partially covered by Tip).

MobileNav.jsx: max-w-[180px] hard-codes the layout for the Emergent badge width. If the platform badge ever changes size or position, items may overlap again. Consider using pr-[160px] on the parent <nav> instead of max-w on the <ul>, OR detecting viewport and the badge bounds dynamically.

success_rate.backend: N/A (skipped per request — validated 100% in iteration_3)

context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.2 is fully working end-to-end. Selectors confirmed: share-palette-btn, active-palette-display, nav-link-compare, mobile-nav-compare, compare-page, compare-a-select, compare-b-select, compare-swap-btn, compare-a-contrast, compare-a-diversity, compare-a-swatch-*, contrast-matrix, matrix-a-vs-b, matrix-b-vs-a, calc-tab-volume, calc-tab-pricing, calc-volume-input, calc-ratio-2:1, calc-pigment-input, result-resin, result-hardener, result-pigment, price-hourly, result-preco-venda. Mobile bottom nav reduced to 4 items with max-w-[180px] to coexist with the platform-injected #emergent-badge — this layout is fragile to platform changes but works today. Clipboard tested via context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write']) on the Playwright BrowserContext.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. The previous iteration_3 HIGH mobile-nav bug was fixed by reducing the mobile bottom nav from 6 to 4 items and constraining the <ul> to max-w-[180px] justify-start, leaving the right portion of the row free for the Emergent badge.
